title: Welcome to the MeowVault!
subtitle: Learn JavaScript and have fun!
register: Please, log in before choosing a game.

description.first: MeowVault is a system helping students to prepare for their FrontEnd interviews. It consists of funny games, playing which helps them practice their skills in a fun and engaging way.
description.second: MeowVault is a soft and comfortable way to learn, as soft as a cat's paws which is the symbol of our project. We believe that learning should be enjoyable and stress-free, just like the gentle touch of a cat's paws.
description.third: So, get ready to have fun while sharpening your FrontEnd skills with MeowVault!
